subtitle: And I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer
aboutme: I'm a Brazilian Computer Science undergraduate, currently working as a project manager and software engineer at Softeam. My expertise lies in C#/.NET and its ecosystem, with additional experience in C, C++, Dart, Java, JavaScript, and more.

projects.title: Basalt
projects.description: A highly customizable game development library where every component can be changed.

projects.title: TMath
projects.description: A powerful and extensive math library for generic numeric types.

projects.title: SharpTables
projects.description: A highly customizable and versatile library for writing tables and graphs to console.

projects.title: tmplt
projects.description: A CLI tool for creating file structure templates with highly configurable variables.

projects.title: SteamWebSharp
projects.description: A Steam Web API Wrapper where each point is its own interface. Supports Retrying on fail, Caching with a custom provider interface, Logging through ILogger and more

projects.title: Mapeteer
projects.description: Yet another object mapper for C#. Supports automatic binding based on property names, configurable type conversion and more.

projects.title: Phasmosheet
projects.description: A cheatsheet website for identifying different ghosts in Phasmophobia.

projects.title: Mindustry Toolbox
projects.description: A sector browser and resource throughput calculator for optimizing resources in Mindustry.
